tasks.name: Create StarRating component skeleton
tasks.purpose: Establish base TypeScript file structure for star rating display component

constraints: Must be client component ('use client')
Must accept rating prop (1-5)
Must accept optional className prop
Must export StarRating as named export

tasks.output_state: packages/ui/src/aceternity/star-rating.tsx exists with component skeleton accepting rating and className props
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists with StarRating component interface defined

tasks.name: Add star icons to StarRating component
tasks.purpose: Render filled and empty stars based on rating value using lucide-react Star icon

constraints: Must render exactly 5 stars
Stars 1-rating should be filled (fill=currentColor)
Stars rating+1 to 5 should be empty (fill=none)
Stars should use text-yellow-400 for filled color
Must support className prop for container styling

tasks.input_state: StarRating component skeleton exists without star rendering
tasks.output_state: StarRating component renders 5 stars with correct filled/empty state based on rating prop
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders star icons with correct fill state for rating values 1-5

tasks.name: Export StarRating from package.json

constraints: Must add to exports object
Path must be ./src/aceternity/star-rating.tsx
Key must be ./star-rating
Must maintain alphabetical order in exports

tasks.input_state: package.json exports do not include star-rating

tasks.name: Add glass card styling to testimonial Card
tasks.purpose: Apply backdrop-blur and semi-transparent background for glass effect on testimonial cards

checks.target: This platform transformed how I create presentations

constraints: Must preserve existing dark theme styling
Add backdrop-blur-md class
Add bg-card/50 for semi-transparent background
Add border-border/30 for subtle border
Keep existing rounded-xl and padding
Preserve QuoteIcon decoration

tasks.input_state: Card component has solid background with shadow styling
tasks.output_state: Card component has glass effect with backdrop-blur-md and semi-transparent background
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Card className includes backdrop-blur and bg-card/50

tasks.name: Add StarRating to testimonial cards
tasks.purpose: Display star rating below testimonial content using database rating field

constraints: Must import StarRating component
Place StarRating between Quote and avatar section
Pass testimonial.rating to rating prop
Add mt-4 spacing above StarRating
Default to rating=5 if testimonial.rating is undefined

tasks.input_state: Testimonial cards show content and author but no rating stars
tasks.output_state: Testimonial cards display star rating below content using StarRating component
tasks.acceptance_criterion: StarRating component is imported and rendered in Card with testimonial.rating prop

tasks.name: Add motion wrapper to grid container
tasks.purpose: Prepare grid container for staggered child animations with viewport detection

constraints: Must add 'use client' directive
Import motion from motion/react
Wrap outer grid container with motion.div
Add viewport prop with once: true and margin: '-50px'
Preserve grid className and structure
Keep columnIndex key on columns unchanged

tasks.input_state: Grid uses plain div without motion wrapper
tasks.output_state: Grid wrapped in motion.div with viewport configuration for scroll detection
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Grid container is motion.div with viewport prop configured
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "'use client'" packages/ui/src/aceternity/testimonial-masonary-grid.tsx && grep -q 'import.*motion.*from.*motion/react' packages/ui/src/aceternity/testimonial-masonary-grid.tsx && grep -q 'viewport.*once.*true' packages/ui/src/aceternity/testimonial-masonary-grid.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add stagger animation variants to cards
tasks.purpose: Create staggered fade-in animation when testimonials scroll into view

constraints: Define containerVariants with hidden and visible states
Use stagger(0.1) for delayChildren in visible variant
Define cardVariants with opacity 0→1 and y 20→0
Add initial='hidden' and whileInView='visible' to grid container
Add variants prop to motion.div container
Convert Card to motion.div and add cardVariants
Use spring transition with stiffness: 100, damping: 20

tasks.input_state: Cards appear instantly without animation when scrolling into view
tasks.output_state: Cards fade in with staggered timing (0.1s delay between each) when section enters viewport
tasks.acceptance_criterion: containerVariants and cardVariants are defined, motion.div has variants and whileInView props
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'stagger' packages/ui/src/aceternity/testimonial-masonary-grid.tsx && grep -q 'containerVariants' packages/ui/src/aceternity/testimonial-masonary-grid.tsx && grep -q 'cardVariants' packages/ui/src/aceternity/testimonial-masonary-grid.tsx && grep -q 'whileInView' packages/ui/src/aceternity/testimonial-masonary-grid.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add featured card logic and styling
tasks.purpose: Make first testimonial card span 2 columns on desktop for visual hierarchy

constraints: First testimonial (index 0 overall) should span 2 columns
Add lg:col-span-2 class to featured card
Featured card should only span on large screens (lg breakpoint)
Add subtle visual distinction: border-border instead of border-border/30
Featured card should remain in grid flow (not absolute positioned)

tasks.input_state: All testimonial cards have equal width in grid
tasks.output_state: First testimonial card spans 2 columns on desktop (lg breakpoint and above)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: First card has lg:col-span-2 class applied conditionally

tasks.name: Add hover effect to cards
tasks.purpose: Create subtle lift effect on card hover for interactivity feedback

constraints: Add hover:-translate-y-1 class to Card
Add transition-transform duration-200 for smooth animation
Preserve existing glass effect styling
Effect should work on both regular and featured cards

tasks.input_state: Cards have no hover interaction effect
tasks.output_state: Cards lift slightly (translate -4px) on hover with smooth transition
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Card className includes hover:-translate-y-1 and transition-transform

tasks.name: Add reduced motion support
tasks.purpose: Respect user's reduced motion preference by disabling animations when requested

constraints: Import useReducedMotion hook
Check shouldReduceMotion before applying animations
If reduced motion: skip stagger animation, show cards immediately
If reduced motion: keep hover effect but reduce/remove transition
Default to immediate visibility if motion disabled

tasks.input_state: Animations always play regardless of user preference
tasks.output_state: Animations skip when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, cards appear immediately
tasks.acceptance_criterion: useReducedMotion hook is used to conditionally apply animations
